description: Global OSCE marking scheme - applies across all stations

subdomains.name: Presenting Complaint
subdomains.description: Onset, duration, character, severity, radiation, timing

subdomains.name: Social History
subdomains.description: Living situation, functional status, support system

subdomains.name: General Inspection
subdomains.description: Appearance, distress, position, vital signs interpretation

subdomains.name: Correct Technique
subdomains.description: Proper sequence, hand hygiene, draping, gentleness

subdomains.name: Complete Assessment
subdomains.description: All relevant maneuvers performed, special tests if indicated

subdomains.name: Appropriate Selection
subdomains.description: Correct tests ordered for clinical scenario

subdomains.name: Differential Diagnosis
subdomains.description: Relevant differentials in order of likelihood

subdomains.name: Clinical Reasoning
subdomains.description: Logical connection between findings and diagnosis

fail.description: Significant deficiencies. Critical items missed. Potential patient harm.
fail.recommendation: Remedial training required before attempting again

borderline.description: Some critical items missed. Inconsistent performance.
borderline.recommendation: Review missed items and practice targeted skills

pass.description: Essential items completed. Safe to practice with supervision.
pass.recommendation: Continue practicing to improve speed and completeness

good.description: Systematic approach. Most items addressed correctly.
good.recommendation: Refine efficiency and subtle examination findings

professional_behaviour.name: Professional Behaviour
bonus_items: Shows empathy and addresses patient concerns
Thanks patient at end of encounter
penalty_items: Does not respond to patient's distress/anxiety
Does not explain findings or plan

passing_criteria.critical_items: All critical items must be completed
